title: Cleanup: Remove DB/Tasks/Workflows from portfolio-ai
description:
Remove remaining dev tooling tabs from portfolio-ai /capabilities page.

**Remove:**
- DB tab
- Tasks (Celery) tab  
- Workflows tab
- CapabilitiesTable.tsx component
- WorkflowCanvas.tsx component
- Related API lib files if orphaned

**Update:**
- SummitFlow redirect banner to include DB/Tasks

**Blocked by:** All implementation tasks complete
**Parent:** summitflow-q3n

title: Design: Shared Explorer component architecture
description:
Design shared component system for unified explorer UI.

**Deliverables:**
1. Component hierarchy diagram
2. Shared base components spec:
   - ExplorerLayout (tree + detail pane split)
   - TreeNav (expandable hierarchy)
   - DetailPanel (context-specific content)
   - BreadcrumbNav
   - ActionToolbar
3. Props/interfaces for customization per tab
4. Theme tokens (phosphor-green, dark mode)
5. Interaction patterns (keyboard nav, selection, context menus)
6. Mockups/wireframes for each tab

**Use:** frontend-design plugin for visual design

**Blocked by:** summitflow-mzl (discovery)
**Parent:** summitflow-q3n

title: Implement: Files Explorer tab (restore functionality)
description:
Rebuild Files tab with full Windows Explorer functionality.

**Features to restore/implement:**
- Tree navigation with folder expand/collapse
- File list with sortable columns (name, size, LOC, modified)
- Breadcrumb navigation
- File details panel (git history, bloat indicators, stale status)
- Search/filter
- Scan action

**Backend:** Already exists - /api/projects/{id}/files/*

**Use:** 
- Shared explorer components from summitflow-4to
- frontend-design plugin for styling

**Blocked by:** summitflow-4to (design)
**Parent:** summitflow-q3n

title: Implement: Database Explorer tab
description:
Build Database Explorer tab with Windows Explorer style.

**Features:**
- Tree navigation: schemas > tables > columns
- Table list with health status indicators (active/orphaned/legacy/suspect)
- Column details panel (type, constraints, indexes)
- Row counts, relationships
- Search/filter by table name, health status
- Scan action

**Backend:** Already exists - /api/projects/{id}/capabilities/database/*

**Use:** 
- Shared explorer components from summitflow-4to
- frontend-design plugin for styling

**Blocked by:** summitflow-59y (Files - build shared components first)
**Parent:** summitflow-q3n

title: Implement: Tasks Explorer tab (replaces Workflows)
description:
Build Tasks Explorer tab with Windows Explorer style, replacing Workflows.

**Features:**
- Tree navigation: workers > queues > tasks OR by schedule/type
- Task list with status indicators
- Task details panel (schedule, last run, duration, dependencies)
- Filter by status, schedule type, recent failures
- Cross-project view (see tasks from all registered projects)
- Visual dependency tree (optional enhancement)

**Backend:** Already exists - /api/projects/{id}/capabilities/celery/*, /api/tasks/*

**Use:** 
- Shared explorer components from summitflow-4to
- frontend-design plugin for styling

**Blocked by:** summitflow-59y (Files - build shared components first)
**Parent:** summitflow-q3n

title: Discovery: Review old Files/DB/Tasks implementations
description:
**VERY THOROUGH exploration** of existing implementations before any coding.

**Sources to review:**
- Git history: portfolio-ai FilesTab.tsx before SummitFlow migration
- Current portfolio-ai: CapabilitiesTable.tsx, WorkflowCanvas.tsx
- Current SummitFlow: FilesTab.tsx (what's broken/missing)
- Backups if available

**Deliverables:**
1. Document what Files explorer HAD vs what it has NOW
2. Document DB tab current functionality  
3. Document Tasks/Workflows current functionality
4. Identify shared patterns (tree nav, detail panes, expand/collapse)
5. List all backend endpoints available in SummitFlow
6. Screenshots/diagrams of old vs current state
7. Recommended shared component architecture

**Output:** Markdown doc with findings + visual diagrams + clarifying questions for user

**Parent:** summitflow-q3n

title: Epic: Unified Explorer UI for Files, DB, and Tasks
description:
Build consistent Windows Explorer-style hierarchical views for Files, DB, and Tasks tabs in SummitFlow.

**Problem:**
- Files tab lost explorer functionality during migration (now too rudimentary)
- DB tab needs migration from portfolio-ai with improved UI
- Tasks tab needs migration, replacing Workflows with better explorer view

**Goal:**
Unified visual language across all three tabs:
- Hierarchical tree navigation (left pane)
- Details/content panel (right pane)  
- Consistent expand/collapse, icons, selection behavior
- SummitFlow phosphor-green/dark theme

**Approach:**
1. Discovery phase - review old implementations, document patterns
2. Design phase - visual diagrams, shared components spec
3. Implementation - build sequentially to maintain consistency

**Note:** Use frontend-design plugin for all UI work.

**Replaces:** summitflow-y6s.1 (Celery task explorer)

title: Epic: SummitFlow Platform Extraction
description:
Extract dev tooling from portfolio-ai into standalone SummitFlow platform.

**Goal:** Reduce portfolio-ai by ~30%, create reusable dev platform.

**Plan:** ~/.claude/plans/sparkling-meandering-cascade.md

**Phases:**
1. Foundation (repo scaffold, core schema, project registration) - DONE
2. Sitemap extraction (first vertical slice) - DONE
3. Features/Evidence/Vision extraction (main value) - IN PROGRESS
4. Files + remaining tools extraction
5. Commands integration

**Deferred to v1.1:** Auto Mode, AI Reviews, OAuth terminal, Agent Hub

**Migrated from:** portfolio-ai-43g
notes: Phase 3 COMPLETE: Features/Evidence/Vision extraction done. Removed 3,640 lines from portfolio-ai. Added SummitFlow redirect banner to portfolio-ai /capabilities page.

title: Cross-project Celery task explorer
description:
Hierarchical task viewer for all registered projects.

**Features:**
- Tree view showing task dependencies (parent > children)
- Expandable task groups (by schedule, by type, by status)
- Details panel showing:
  - Task: schedule, last run, duration, dependencies, logs
  - Group: task count, success rate, next scheduled
- Visual dependency tree (what blocks what)
- Filter by status, schedule type, recent failures
- Cross-project view (see tasks from portfolio-ai, summitflow, etc.)

**Reference:** Reverted commit 6bff7e1 in portfolio-ai (portfolio-ai-0hl)

**Why SummitFlow:** This is dev tooling for understanding task architecture across projects, not operational monitoring.

title: Sitemap UI polish
description:
Create /sitemap page and polish UI to match SummitFlow design aesthetic.

**Current state:**
- Sidebar links to /sitemap (404)
- SitemapTab component exists and works at /projects/[id]
- alert() calls need toast replacement

**Work:**
1. Create /app/sitemap/page.tsx as standalone sitemap view (cross-project or project selector)
2. Replace alert() calls with proper toast notifications
3. Use frontend-design skill for design consistency
4. Ensure matches phosphor-green/dark theme

**Migrated from:** portfolio-ai-gil

title: Agent Hub: Centralized AI orchestration
description:
Centralized AI orchestration hub for SummitFlow.

**Features (from portfolio-ai Agent Hub):**
- Multi-agent chat interface (Claude, Gemini)
- Context injection from current page/feature
- Evidence capture integration
- Browser automation for testing
- Pre-populated prompts based on context

**Why SummitFlow:** Agent Hub is dev tooling - helps developers interact with AI for debugging, testing, and exploration. Not user-facing functionality.

**Status:** DEFERRED to v1.1
**Blocked:** Requires planning session to define cross-project architecture

title: Review beads docs against official documentation
description:
Review and update SummitFlow's beads documentation against official beads docs.

**PRIMARY SOURCES:**
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/main/docs/QUICKSTART.md
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/main/README.md
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/main/docs/AGENT_MAIL.md
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/main/docs/DAEMON.md

**FILES TO REVIEW:**
- .claude/docs/bead-reference.md
- .claude/rules/issue-tracking.md
- .claude/rules/bead-quality.md
- CLAUDE.md
- AGENTS.md

**CHECKLIST:**
1. Verify all bd commands are documented correctly
2. Check for new features in official docs
3. Add any missing dependency commands (bd dep tree, bd dep cycles)
4. Document bd ready, bd blocked patterns
5. Review hierarchy notation (project-id.N.N)
6. Check bd stats, bd info commands
